24.reason: [Resetting j to 0 inside the loop causes infinite loop or incorrect traversal because it restarts the inner loop from the beginning every time a connection is found, potentially revisiting already processed segments and not following the chain in order. Also, this approach does not correctly model the directed acyclic nature of the chain due to lack of sorting and proper DP.]
